metadata.description: Azure region for all monitoring resources
Log Analytics Workspace name
Application Insights name
Data retention in days (30 dev / 90 prod)
Daily ingestion cap in GB (-1 = no cap)
Short name in alert notifications (max 12 chars)
Email receivers: [{ name: string, emailAddress: string }]
Webhook/Teams receivers: [{ name: string, serviceUri: string }]
Event Hub Namespace name
Event Hub name for log export
Front Door profile name. Leave empty to skip this diag module.
Resource group of the Front Door profile
Container Apps managed environment name. Leave empty to skip.
Resource group of the Container Apps environment
VNet name (used for flow log naming). Leave empty to skip.
Full ARM resource ID of the VNet, e.g. /subscriptions/{sub}/resourceGroups/{rg}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{name}
Storage Account resource ID for raw VNet flow log storage
Network Watcher name for the deployment region
Resource group containing the Network Watcher (default: NetworkWatcherRG)
Traffic Analytics aggregation interval in minutes
Storage account name. Leave empty to skip.
Resource group of the storage account
Key Vault name. Leave empty to skip.
Resource group of the Key Vault
Azure region for all resources
Environment name — controls sampling rate and naming
Name of the Log Analytics Workspace
Name of the Application Insights instance
Data retention in days (30–730)
Daily ingestion cap in GB. Use -1 for no cap.
Prefer connectionString over instrumentationKey for new SDK versions
Environment suffix used in the action group name
Short name shown in alert emails and SMS (max 12 chars)
Email receivers. Each item: { name, emailAddress }
Webhook/Teams receivers. Each item: { name, serviceUri }
Log Analytics Workspace resource ID — all KQL alerts target this scope
Action Group resource ID to notify on alert fire/resolve
Azure region — required for scheduledQueryRules resources
Environment name used in display names and resource names

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Container Apps — Error spike (>10 in 5 min)', toUpper(parameters('environment')))]
properties.description: Console logs contain more than 10 Error/Exception lines in a 5-minute window

allOf.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where Log has_any ("Error", "Exception", "FATAL", "Unhandled")
| summarize ErrorCount = count() by ContainerAppName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where ErrorCount > 10

properties.description: Key Vault is returning 429 Too Many Requests — client is being rate-limited

allOf.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.KEYVAULT"
| where toint(httpStatusCode_d) == 429
| summarize ThrottleCount = count() by Resource, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where ThrottleCount > 5

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Front Door — 5xx error spike (>20 in 5 min)', toUpper(parameters('environment')))]
properties.description: Azure Front Door is returning more than 20 server-side errors in a 5-minute window

allOf.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN"
| where Category == "FrontDoorAccessLog"
| where httpStatusCode_d >= 500 and httpStatusCode_d < 600
| summarize ErrorCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where ErrorCount > 20

properties.description: Storage blob service is returning HTTP 5xx errors, indicating service-side issues

allOf.query:
StorageBlobLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30m)
| where StatusCode >= 500
| summarize ErrorCount = count() by AccountName, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| where ErrorCount > 10

properties.description: A secret or key was deleted in Key Vault — verify this is intentional

allOf.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.KEYVAULT"
| where OperationName has_any ("SecretDelete", "KeyDelete", "CertificateDelete")
| project TimeGenerated, Resource, OperationName, CallerIPAddress, ResultType, requestUri_s

metadata.description: Azure region
Environment name
Log Analytics Workspace name — needed to scope the data export child resource
Event Hub Namespace name
Name of the Event Hub that receives the exported log tables
Event Hub Namespace SKU. Standard supports 1 consumer group; Premium adds partitions and schema registry.
Message retention in days (Basic: max 1, Standard/Premium: max 7)
Partition count — higher value allows more parallel SIEM consumers
Name of the Front Door Standard/Premium profile (Microsoft.Cdn/profiles)
Log Analytics Workspace resource ID — destination for all log categories
Event Hub authorization rule resource ID for SIEM streaming (leave empty to skip)
Event Hub name for streaming (required when eventHubAuthorizationRuleId is set)
Name of the Container Apps managed environment (Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments)
Log Analytics Workspace resource ID
Event Hub authorization rule resource ID for SIEM streaming (leave empty to skip)
Event Hub name for streaming (required when eventHubAuthorizationRuleId is set)
Azure region — must match the VNet and Network Watcher region
Name of the Network Watcher for this region (auto-created by Azure)
VNet name — used only for naming the flow log resource
Full ARM resource ID of the VNet, e.g. /subscriptions/.../virtualNetworks/vnet-name
Storage Account resource ID for raw flow log JSON (required by ARM even when Traffic Analytics is enabled)
Log Analytics Workspace resource ID for Traffic Analytics
Log Analytics Workspace GUID (customerId) — NOT the ARM resource ID. Output from log-analytics module.
Azure region of the Log Analytics Workspace
Raw flow log retention in days in the storage account
Traffic Analytics aggregation interval in minutes. 10 min = near-real-time, 60 min = lower cost.
Environment suffix for resource naming
Storage account name
Log Analytics Workspace resource ID
Event Hub authorization rule resource ID for SIEM streaming (leave empty to skip)
Event Hub name for streaming (required when eventHubAuthorizationRuleId is set)
Key Vault name
Log Analytics Workspace resource ID
Event Hub authorization rule resource ID for SIEM streaming (leave empty to skip)
Event Hub name for streaming (required when eventHubAuthorizationRuleId is set)
